build: mainnet private beta (own DEX + betaMode allowlist + 0.001 ETH cap)
notes: MAINNET private beta. betaMode ON — only the allowlisted wallet creates/trades. Each curve holds <=0.001 ETH before graduating (LP burned). Own Uniswap-v2 DEX + WETH deployed alongside. Admin/owner/treasury = the deployer 0xA49dc277 (NOTE: this key was exposed in plaintext during setup — rotate ownership to a fresh/multisig wallet before scaling or going public). Add wallets: factory.setBetaAllowed([addr], true). Go public: factory.setBetaMode(false).
